info_CN: 减论Agent通过算法为您推荐
慕尼黑工业大学提出了GSFix3D方法
通过将扩散模型的先验知识蒸馏到3D高斯点云表示中
结合定制的潜在扩散模型GSFixer及随机掩码增强策略
实现了对极端视角和部分观测区域的新视图高质量修复
The Technical University of Munich introduced GSFix3D

a framework that improves visual fidelity in under-constrained regions by distilling prior knowledge from diffusion models into 3D representations using a latent diffusion model called GSFixer and a random mask augmentation strategy for novel view repair and inpainting
info_EN: The Technical University of Munich introduced GSFix3D

a framework that improves visual fidelity in under-constrained regions by distilling prior knowledge from diffusion models into 3D representations using a latent diffusion model called GSFixer and a random mask augmentation strategy for novel view repair and inpainting
